# Implementer Instructions

Read `plans/todoapp.md` and build the todo app exactly as specified.

You are inside a Bach-managed clone workspace. Make source changes, run `./scripts/run-bats.sh`, commit the result, and write the required Agent Report JSON to `$BACH_AGENT_REPORT_PATH`.

The final app is not a mock. It must be a working shell CLI validated by real Bats tests in the same repository.
